message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Planning Scenario 'default operator information' – V1.0.0

participant "MP" as MP
participant "Lookup" as Lookup
participant "TO" as TO

note right of TO: **ProcessIdentifiers**: DEFAULT

note over MP, Lookup #LightYellow
Endpoints that could be used by the MP:
/operator/meta
/operator/available-assets
/operator/stations
/operator/regions
/operator/operating-calendar
/operator/operating-hours
/operator/pricing-plans
/operator/information
end note

Lookup -> TO : e.g. /operator/available-assets
TO --> Lookup : available assettypes (optionally containing assets)

note over MP, Lookup #LightYellow
Endpoints that could be used by the MP:
/operator/meta
/operator/information
/operator/regions
end note

Lookup -> TO : e.g. /operator/meta
TO --> Lookup : precise description of the implementation of the API

@enduml
```
